action: Add commit and decision-history records, preserving unresolved deployment state without overwriting prior observations.

verification.method: GitHub contents API accepted the replacement JSON and returned a new content blob SHA
verification.schema_contract: All added records use existing schema enums and include source identity, privacy class, and review route.

privacy_boundary: Only public repository files and commit metadata were indexed. No raw chat, health, pet-health, credentials, contact data, or uploaded-file contents were copied.
handoff: Reconcile this owned sidecar into operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json on the next conflict-free queue update; next continuity slice should add an explicit decision-event schema with valid-time and transaction-time fields so later corrections can supersede claims without erasing history.
